hooks.command: node -e "const p=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; if(p.includes('/legacy/') && !process.env.CLAUDE_LEGACY_WRITE_ALLOWED) { console.error('BLOCKED: legacy/ is read-only after characterization tests pass.
